ft1_1.Body: Once upon a time, there is a Adventurer teaverling around the word.

ft1_2.Body: They have the sharpest soward and the hardest shield in the world as their partners.

ft1_3.Body: One day on their trip, the Adventurer saw a person running out from the forest with dust and wonds.

ft1_4.Body:
What happend? The Adventurer asked.
 'There's a monster took over our kingdom!' Answered the person just exited the forst

ft1_5.Body: Hearing that, the Adventurer decided to get on the way of defeating the monster.

ft1_6.Body: With their best soward and shield, now they are on their way.

ft1_7.Body: With their best soward and shield, now they are on their way.

bf1_1.Body: Working hard, you finally make out from the forest to the kingdom.

bf1_2.Body: Follow the moster foot steps, the Adventurer make it a tower.

bf1_3.Body:
Outside the tower, you saw lots of small monsters and other adventurers' dead body.
The king of the monsters must be here.

bf1_5.Boday: The Adventurer hold the wepons tight in their hand, step in the tower.

c1_1.Body: After the hard fight, the Adventurer became the hero of the kingdom.

c1_2.Body: The citizens celerbate the great victory, and wanting to let the Adventurer to take the crown.

c1_3.Body: Day flies, now is the day of coronation.

c2_1.Body: 'You' left the coronation, grab your soward and shield and rush out the castle, lefting the sounds calling you behind.

c2_2.Body:
'We need a hero! we need a hero!
 The people chased after you, you have no place to hind.
 Accidently, you are back in the tower, in the room where the monster was.

c2_3.Body:
Your soward shines with a cold gleam, your shield is still heavy and hard.
 They are ready for another fight.

c2_4.Body:
You took a deapth breath, and open the door.
 The people outside the door does not have the looks they looked anymore.
 they are no different like the moster you fight before.

bf2_1.Body:
You finally make a way out from the tower.
 You heared sound echoing in your head, getting sharp.
'No this is not right...
You should be back and reach the happy ending...
 This is not right..'

bf2_2.Body: You shake your head, run into the forest.
